name: Deal qualification agent
description: a deal-qualification agent that scores inbound sales opportunities. enrich the lead from CRM and firmographic sources, then score fit and intent. route qualified deals to an account executive. reads CRM opportunities and writes qualification scores back to CRM.
acceptance_criteria: qualification must complete within 2 minutes at the 95th percentile
nfrs: all customer contact data is encrypted at rest and in transit
